---
title: "Acme Analysis Report"
format: acme-html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  store: "_targets"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(acme.toolkit)
store <- Sys.getenv("TAR_STORE", unset = params$store)
```

This report reads results from a `targets` store and summarises each analysis.
Parameters and the store path are supplied at render time, so the same template
serves every pipeline.

```{r}
#| label: results
#| output: asis
targets <- targets::tar_manifest(store = store)$name
analysis_targets <- setdiff(targets, c("input_file", "dataset"))

for (name in analysis_targets) {
  result <- targets::tar_read_raw(name, store = store)
  cat("\n\n## ", name, " (", result@method, ")\n\n", sep = "")
  print(knitr::kable(result@summary))
}
```

```{r}
#| label: plot
#| eval: !expr requireNamespace("ggplot2", quietly = TRUE) && length(analysis_targets) > 0
first <- targets::tar_read_raw(analysis_targets[[1]], store = store)
if (identical(first@method, "describe")) {
  library(ggplot2)
  ggplot(first@summary) +
    aes(x = stats::reorder(.data$variable, .data$mean), y = .data$mean) +
    geom_col(fill = acme.toolkit:::acme_palette()[["primary"]]) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = "Variable", y = "Mean") +
    theme_acme()
}
```
